'''K749 system''', also known as the '''Pzob system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], near [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]] and [[K749 system's star|one]] [[Star/Legends|star]].

{{System-stub}}
